title: cattleya × elegans var. houtteana
intro: Cattleya × elegans var. houtteana, also known as the Houtte's Cattleya, is a hybrid orchid species within the Cattleya genus, characterized by its showy white flowers and robust growth habit. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cattleya × elegans var. houtteana are attributed to its ability to reduce stress, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
